testcase.name: test_task_has_file_artifact[jsonrpc]

failure.message: AssertionError: DM-ART-001 [Artifact contains required fields] failed on jsonrpc: Expected filename 'output.txt', got None (see specification/specification.md#417-artifact)

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_artifacts.py:162: in test_task_has_file_artifact assert_and_record(compatibility_collector, req, transport, errors) tests\compatibility\_test_helpers.py:59: in assert_and_record assert passed, fail_msg(req, transport, "; ".join(errors)) ^^^^^^ E AssertionError: DM-ART-001 [Artifact contains required fields] failed on jsonrpc: Expected filename 'output.txt', got None (see specification/specification.md#417-artifact)

failure.message: AssertionError: DM-ART-001 [Artifact contains required fields] failed on jsonrpc: Expected filename 'output.txt', got None (see specification/specification.md#417-artifact)

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_artifacts.py:216: in test_task_has_file_url_artifact assert_and_record(compatibility_collector, req, transport, errors) tests\compatibility\_test_helpers.py:59: in assert_and_record assert passed, fail_msg(req, transport, "; ".join(errors)) ^^^^^^ E AssertionError: DM-ART-001 [Artifact contains required fields] failed on jsonrpc: Expected filename 'output.txt', got None (see specification/specification.md#417-artifact)

testcase.name: test_must_requirement[CORE-SEND-002-jsonrpc]

failure.message: AssertionError: CORE-SEND-002 [SendMessage rejects messages to terminal tasks] failed on jsonrpc: Expected error code -32004 (UnsupportedOperationError), got -32001 (see specification/specification.md#311-send-message) assert not ['Expected error code -32004 (UnsupportedOperationError), got -32001']

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_requirements.py:190: in test_must_requirement assert not errors, _format_failure(requirement, transport, errors) E AssertionError: CORE-SEND-002 [SendMessage rejects messages to terminal tasks] failed on jsonrpc: Expected error code -32004 (UnsupportedOperationError), got -32001 (see specification/specification.md#311-send-message) E assert not ['Expected error code -32004 (UnsupportedOperationError), got -32001']

testcase.name: test_must_requirement[STREAM-SUB-004-jsonrpc]

failure.message: AssertionError: STREAM-SUB-004 [SubscribeToTask returns TaskNotFoundError for invalid task] failed on jsonrpc: Expected TaskNotFoundError but stream was empty (no error) (see specification/specification.md#316-subscribe-to-task) assert not ['Expected TaskNotFoundError but stream was empty (no error)']

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_requirements.py:190: in test_must_requirement assert not errors, _format_failure(requirement, transport, errors) E AssertionError: STREAM-SUB-004 [SubscribeToTask returns TaskNotFoundError for invalid task] failed on jsonrpc: Expected TaskNotFoundError but stream was empty (no error) (see specification/specification.md#316-subscribe-to-task) E assert not ['Expected TaskNotFoundError but stream was empty (no error)']

testcase.name: test_subscribe_rejects_terminal_task[jsonrpc]

failure.message: AssertionError: STREAM-SUB-003 [SubscribeToTask rejects terminal tasks] failed on jsonrpc: SubscribeToTask on a terminal task should return an error, but succeeded (see specification/specification.md#316-subscribe-to-task)

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_task_lifecycle.py:461: in test_subscribe_rejects_terminal_task assert_and_record(compatibility_collector, req, transport, errors) tests\compatibility\_test_helpers.py:59: in assert_and_record assert passed, fail_msg(req, transport, "; ".join(errors)) ^^^^^^ E AssertionError: STREAM-SUB-003 [SubscribeToTask rejects terminal tasks] failed on jsonrpc: SubscribeToTask on a terminal task should return an error, but succeeded (see specification/specification.md#316-subscribe-to-task)

testcase.name: test_streaming_content_type

failure.message: AssertionError: JSONRPC-SSE-001 [Streaming uses Server-Sent Events with text/event-stream] failed on jsonrpc: Streaming Content-Type must be text/event-stream, got: 'application/json' (see specification/specification.md#942-sendstreamingmessage)

testcase.failure: tests\compatibility\core_operations\test_transport_behavior.py:224: in test_streaming_content_type assert_and_record(compatibility_collector, req, transport, errors) tests\compatibility\_test_helpers.py:59: in assert_and_record assert passed, fail_msg(req, transport, "; ".join(errors)) ^^^^^^ E AssertionError: JSONRPC-SSE-001 [Streaming uses Server-Sent Events with text/event-stream] failed on jsonrpc: Streaming Content-Type must be text/event-stream, got: 'application/json' (see specification/specification.md#942-sendstreamingmessage)
